CRANK_TYPE_003 — turn/3 returns a state not in the declared union.

Severity: warning. When `use Crank, states: [:a, :b]` is set, returning
`{:next, :c, memory}` is flagged. Caught by Crank.Typing's @before_compile
hook.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/typing_test.exs — assertions on return-shape checks.
- test/support/typing_fixtures.ex.
